column1: # IERS Earth Orientation Parameters slice for Phase 1 regression tests.

column2: one row per Modified Julian Date.

column1: # Phase 1 disclaimer: this is a SYNTHETIC IERS EOP slice — values are
# representative monthly averages drawn from public IERS Bulletin A
# summaries for the regression-test epoch window. Live-fetch tooling
# against datacenter.iers.org (REQ-TIME-004) is a Phase 7 deliverable.
# Reference epoch window: MJD 60676 (2025-01-01 UTC) to MJD 64336
# (jpl_de_roundtrip and iss_vector) plus a 90-day pad on either side.
